Package org.rodinp.internal.core

Class RodinDBOperation

java.lang.Object
org.rodinp.internal.core.RodinDBOperation
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.eclipse.core.resources.IWorkspaceRunnable, org.eclipse.core.runtime.ICoreRunnable, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor
Direct Known Subclasses:
BatchOperation, ChangeElementAttributeOperation, CreateInternalElementOperation, CreateProblemMarkerOperation, CreateRodinFileOperation, MultiOperation, RemoveElementAttributeOperation, SaveRodinFileOperation
public abstract class RodinDBOperation extends Object implements org.eclipse.core.resources.IWorkspaceRunnable, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor
Defines behavior common to all Rodin DB operations

    Class
    Description
    protected static interface 
    RodinDBOperation.IPostAction

    Modifier and Type

    actionsEnd

    actionsStart
     
    protected static final int
    APPEND
    Constants controlling the insertion mode of an action.
    protected HashMap<String,String>
    attributes
    A HashMap of attributes that can be used by operations
    protected IRodinElement[]
    elementsToProcess
    The elements this operation operates on, or null if this operation does not operate on specific elements.
    protected boolean
    force
    Conflict resolution policy - by default do not force (fail on a conflict).
    static final String
    HAS_MODIFIED_RESOURCE_ATTR
     
    protected boolean
    isNested
    A flag indicating whether this operation is nested.
    protected static final int
    KEEP_EXISTING
     
    protected static IRodinElement[]
    NO_ELEMENTS
    An empty collection of IRodinElements - the common empty result if no elements are created, or if this operation is not actually executed.
    protected static ThreadLocal<Stack<RodinDBOperation>>
    operationStacks
    A per thread stack of Rodin database operations
    protected IRodinElement[]
    parentElements
    The parent elements this operation operates with or null if this operation does not operate with specific parent elements.
    protected static boolean
    POST_ACTION_VERBOSE
    Whether tracing post actions is enabled.
    protected org.eclipse.core.runtime.SubMonitor
    progressMonitor
    The progress monitor passed into this operation
    protected static final int
    REMOVEALL_APPEND
     
    protected IRodinElement[]
    resultElements
    The elements created by this operation - empty until the operation actually creates elements.
    static final String
    TRUE

    UNKNOWN

      protected IRodinElement[] elementsToProcess

      protected IRodinElement[] parentElements
      The parent elements this operation operates with or null if this operation does not operate with specific parent elements.

    • NO_ELEMENTS

      protected static IRodinElement[] NO_ELEMENTS
      An empty collection of IRodinElements - the common empty result if no elements are created, or if this operation is not actually executed.

      protected IRodinElement[] resultElements
      The elements created by this operation - empty until the operation actually creates elements.

      Conflict resolution policy - by default do not force (fail on a conflict).

  • Method Details

    • addAction

      protected void addAction(RodinDBOperation.IPostAction action)
      Registers the given action at the end of the list of actions to run.

    • addDelta

      protected void addDelta(IRodinElementDelta delta)
      Registers the given delta with the Rodin database Manager.

    • beginTask

      public void beginTask(String name, int totalWork)
      Specified by:
      beginTask in interface org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor
      See Also:
      • IProgressMonitor

    • checkCanceled

      protected void checkCanceled()
      Checks with the progress monitor to see whether this operation should be canceled. An operation should regularly call this method during its operation so that the user can cancel it.
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.OperationCanceledException - if cancelling the operation has been requested
      See Also:
      • IProgressMonitor.isCanceled()

    • commonVerify

      protected IRodinDBStatus commonVerify()
      Common code used to verify the elements this operation is processing.
      See Also:
      • verify()

    • copyResources

      protected void copyResources(org.eclipse.core.resources.IResource[] resources, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IPath destinationPath) throws RodinDBException
      Convenience method to copy resources
      Throws:
      RodinDBException

    • createFile

      protected void createFile(org.eclipse.core.resources.IFile file, InputStream contents, boolean forceFlag) throws RodinDBException
      Convenience method to create a file
      Throws:
      RodinDBException

    • createFolder

      protected void createFolder(org.eclipse.core.resources.IContainer parentFolder, String name, boolean forceFlag) throws RodinDBException
      Convenience method to create a folder
      Throws:
      RodinDBException

      Convenience method to delete a resource
      Throws:
      RodinDBException

      protected void deleteResources(org.eclipse.core.resources.IResource[] resources, boolean forceFlag) throws RodinDBException
      Convenience method to delete resources

      RodinDBException

      done in interface org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor

    • equalsOneOf

      protected boolean equalsOneOf(org.eclipse.core.runtime.IPath path, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IPath[] otherPaths)
      Returns whether the given path is equals to one of the given other paths.

    • executeNestedOperation

      public void executeNestedOperation(RodinDBOperation operation, int subWorkAmount) throws RodinDBException
      Convenience method to run an operation within this operation
      Throws:
      RodinDBException

    • executeOperation

      protected abstract void executeOperation() throws RodinDBException
      Performs the operation specific behavior. Subclasses must override.
      Throws:
      RodinDBException

    • getAttribute

      protected Object getAttribute(Object key)
      Returns the attribute registered at the given key with the top level operation. Returns null if no such attribute is found.

    • getCurrentOperationStack

      protected Stack<RodinDBOperation> getCurrentOperationStack()
      Returns the stack of operations running in the current thread. Returns an empty stack if no operations are currently running in this thread.

    • getElementsToProcess

      protected IRodinElement[] getElementsToProcess()
      Returns the elements to which this operation applies, or null if not applicable.

    • getElementToProcess

      protected IRodinElement getElementToProcess()
      Returns the element to which this operation applies, or null if not applicable.

    • getRodinDB

      public IRodinDB getRodinDB()
      Returns the Rodin database this operation is operating in.

    • getParentElement

      protected IRodinElement getParentElement()
      Returns the parent element to which this operation applies, or null if not applicable.

    • getParentElements

      protected IRodinElement[] getParentElements()
      Returns the parent elements to which this operation applies, or null if not applicable.

    • getResultElements

      public IRodinElement[] getResultElements()
      Returns the elements created by this operation.

    • getSchedulingRule

      protected org.eclipse.core.runtime.jobs.ISchedulingRule getSchedulingRule()
      Returns the scheduling rule for this operation (i.e. the resource that needs to be locked while this operation is running). Subclasses can override.

    • getSubProgressMonitor

      protected org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor getSubProgressMonitor(int workAmount)
      Creates and returns a subprogress monitor if appropriate.

    • getTopLevelOperation

      protected RodinDBOperation getTopLevelOperation()
      Returns the top-level operation in this thread or null if the stack of current operations is empty.

    • hasModifiedResource

      public boolean hasModifiedResource()
      Returns whether this operation has performed any resource modifications. Returns false if this operation has not been executed yet.

    • internalWorked

      public void internalWorked(double work)
      Specified by:
      internalWorked in interface org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor

    • isCanceled

      public boolean isCanceled()
      Specified by:
      isCanceled in interface org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor
      See Also:
      • IProgressMonitor

    • modifiesResources

      public boolean modifiesResources()
      Returns true if this operation performs no resource modifications, otherwise false. Subclasses must override.

    • isTopLevelOperation

      protected boolean isTopLevelOperation()
      Returns whether this operation is the first operation to run in the current thread.

    • firstActionWithID

      protected int firstActionWithID(String id, int start)
      Returns the index of the first registered action with the given id, starting from a given position. Returns -1 if not found.

    • moveResources

      protected void moveResources(org.eclipse.core.resources.IResource[] resources, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IPath destinationPath) throws RodinDBException
      Convenience method to move resources
      Throws:
      RodinDBException

    • newRodinElementDelta

      public RodinElementDelta newRodinElementDelta()
      Creates and returns a new IRodinElementDelta on the Rodin database.

    • popOperation

      protected RodinDBOperation popOperation()
      Removes the last pushed operation from the stack of running operations. Returns the popped operation or null if the stack was empty.

    • postAction

      protected void postAction(RodinDBOperation.IPostAction action, int insertionMode)
      Registers the given action to be run when the outer most Rodin database operation has finished. The insertion mode controls whether: - the action should discard all existing actions with the same id, and be queued at the end (REMOVEALL_APPEND), - the action should be ignored if there is already an action with the same id (KEEP_EXISTING), - the action should be queued at the end without looking at existing actions (APPEND)

    • prefixesOneOf

      protected boolean prefixesOneOf(org.eclipse.core.runtime.IPath path, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IPath[] otherPaths)
      Returns whether the given path is the prefix of one of the given other paths.

    • pushOperation

      protected void pushOperation(RodinDBOperation operation)
      Pushes the given operation on the stack of operations currently running in this thread.

    • removeAllPostAction

      protected void removeAllPostAction(String actionID)
      Removes all actions with the given id from the queue of post actions. Does nothing if no such action is in the queue.

    • run

      public void run(org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws RodinDBException
      Runs this operation and registers any deltas created.
      Specified by:
      run in interface org.eclipse.core.runtime.ICoreRunnable
      Specified by:
      run in interface org.eclipse.core.resources.IWorkspaceRunnable
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if the operation fails
      See Also:
      • IWorkspaceRunnable

    • runOperation

      public void runOperation(org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws RodinDBException
      Main entry point for Rodin database operations. Runs a Rodin database Operation as an IWorkspaceRunnable if not read-only.
      Throws:
      RodinDBException

    • runPostActions

      protected void runPostActions() throws RodinDBException
      Throws:
      RodinDBException

    • setAttribute

      protected void setAttribute(String key, String attribute)
      Registers the given attribute at the given key with the top level operation.

    • setCanceled

      public void setCanceled(boolean b)
      Specified by:
      setCanceled in interface org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor
      See Also:
      • IProgressMonitor

    • setNested

      protected void setNested(boolean nested)
      Sets whether this operation is nested or not.

    • setTaskName

      public void setTaskName(String name)
      Specified by:
      setTaskName in interface org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor
      See Also:
      • IProgressMonitor

    • subTask

      public void subTask(String name)
      Specified by:
      subTask in interface org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor
      See Also:
      • IProgressMonitor

    • verify

      protected IRodinDBStatus verify()
      Returns a status indicating if there is any known reason this operation will fail. Operations are verified before they are run. Subclasses must override if they have any conditions to verify before this operation executes.
      See Also:
      • IRodinDBStatus

    • worked

      public void worked(int work)
      Specified by:
      worked in interface org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor
      See Also:
      • IProgressMonitor
